hero.heading: Gasser Music Studio
hero.subheading: One-to-one private piano lessons for all ages and levels — face-to-face and online.

about.heading: About the Studio
about.body:
Gasser Music Studio offers one-to-one piano, music theory, and composition lessons for students of all ages and abilities — from complete beginners to advanced players.

Our studio is based in Chorlton, South Manchester, where students learn on a beautiful Yamaha P121 upright piano. Online lessons are also available for students who prefer to learn from home.

Students are welcome to take part in city-centre concerts organised through our main studio branch. All tutors are professionally trained graduates of the Royal Northern College of Music and all staff are DBS cleared.
credentials: Royal Northern College of Music graduates

lessons.heading: Lessons & Pricing
lessons.intro: We offer piano, music theory, and composition lessons for all ages and levels. Lessons are available face-to-face at our Chorlton studio or online. All packages are invoiced monthly.
lessons.discount_note: Morning discount: 5% off when booking 10 or more lessons paid in advance (9 AM – 3:30 PM slots).

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.address: 63 New Barns Avenue, Chorlton, Manchester M21 7DB
